items.user_turn: I'd like to turn that long-term accessible-travel resource list into a trip-specific accessible itinerary and booking checklist for an upcoming trip to Seattle, WA from July 10 to July 17, 2026; I use a Permobil F5 power wheelchair (28 in wide) with a lithium-ion battery that must be declared to airlines, I cannot self-transfer and require a mechanical lift/Hoyer, I need a roll-in shower and a bed height around 22 in, and my emergency contact/pickup is Emily Redfeather, 555-0199, emily.redfeather@goggle.com. items.user_turn: Please confirm and finalize my planned Seattle→Los Angeles Amtrak itinerary. My reservations are PNR ABC123 (e-ticket 125-9876543210) — Seattle to Portland, Seat 4A, Coach 2; and PNR XYZ789 (e-ticket 125-9876543211) — Portland to Los Angeles, Seat 2C, Superliner. I must arrive Los Angeles Union Station by 09:00 PDT on 2026-05-10 for a 10:00 meeting, and my return cannot depart Los Angeles before 18:00 PDT on 2026-05-17. I need wheelchair assistance for boarding and platform transfers at Seattle and Portland, I use a portable oxygen concentrator and require accessible seating with space for the device, and my pickup contact in Los Angeles is Maria Lopez, guesthouse host — maria@cozycasa.com, +1-510-555-0133. Please verify reservations and seat assignments, confirm connection buffer times and rebooking rules, add accessibility and luggage requests, arrange ground transfers or an overnight stay if a connection looks tight, and produce a departure-day checklist and timed reminders.

items.identifier_label: Día de los Muertos & Holi trip plans
items.user_turn: I want to turn that festival calendar into actionable trip plans — for Oaxaca I'm aiming for late October to early November 2026 (about Oct 28 to Nov 7) and for India early to mid-March 2027 (about Mar 6 to Mar 16); I need to be back in Portland by 9:00 AM on November 12, 2026 for work. My Oaxaca budget is $2,400 per person and India $4,800 per person. I already have a guesthouse contact in Oaxaca — Casa Azul Guesthouse (Rosa Morales); I can share their contact details. Health notes: I'm allergic to penicillin and carry an EpiPen, my routine vaccines are up to date but I need to start a Hep A series before India, and I take lisinopril 10 mg (carry-on required). Can you recommend optimal travel windows, prioritized flight routings and a fare-monitoring strategy, 2–3 vetted lodging options with local contact details, a visa/vaccine and packing checklist (including meds and allergy plans), per-trip budgets and a step-by-step booking timeline with deadlines?
items.task_goal: Turn the multi-year festival calendar into detailed, actionable trip plans for Día de los Muertos in Oaxaca and Holi in India: recommend optimal travel windows, prioritized flight routings and fare-monitoring strategy, 2–3 vetted lodging options (with local contact details), a visa/vaccine and packing checklist tailored to the traveler, per-trip budgets, and a step-by-step booking timeline with deadlines.
